title: Hex Dev Audit Trail Wiring Fixes

acceptance_criteria.description: quality_result is populated in session JSON after pipeline completes
acceptance_criteria.verify: jq '.quality_result' on session file — must not be null, must contain grade, score, compile_pass, test_pass

acceptance_criteria.description: Session status transitions to 'completed' when pipeline finishes successfully
acceptance_criteria.verify: jq '.status' on session file — must be 'completed' not 'paused' or 'in_progress'

acceptance_criteria.description: completed_steps populated with workplan step IDs that passed all objectives
acceptance_criteria.verify: jq '.completed_steps' on session file — must not be empty array

acceptance_criteria.description: Code phase tool_calls include model, tokens, input_tokens, output_tokens, cost_usd
acceptance_criteria.verify: jq '.tool_calls[] | select(.phase=="agent-hex-coder") | .model' — must not be null

acceptance_criteria.description: hex report show <id> displays quality gate section with grade and score
acceptance_criteria.verify: Run hex report show <id> — quality section must show grade and score
